title: Calibration of multisite raters for prospective visual reads of amyloid PET scans
authors: David N Soleimani-Meigooni; Stefania Pezzoli; Ganna Blazhenets; R. La Joie; Zoe Lin; Carol Soppe; Derek R. Johnson; M. Koran; J. McConathy; I. Nasrallah; M. Ponisio; Jeremy A. Tanner; V. Villemagne; Charles C Windon; Michael M. Zeineh; Sarah A. Biber; W. Kukull; Heather O’Connell; D. J. Peterson; E. Mormino; S. Johnson; G. Rabinovici
abstract: In multicenter Alzheimer's disease studies, amyloid positron emission tomography (PET) visual reads are typically performed centrally by a few experts. Incorporating a broader reader network enhances scalability and generalizability.
